title: At the Train Station
content: The train station was full of people rushing in different directions. Noah stood near the platform holding a small travel bag and checking the departure board. Announcements echoed through the station while trains arrived and left every few minutes. A street musician played guitar near the entrance, adding music to the busy atmosphere. Noah bought a coffee from a small kiosk and waited quietly for his train. Although the station felt noisy and crowded, he enjoyed watching the different travelers passing by.
